title: Aatelisrosvo Dubrovskij
summaries: "Aatelisrosvo Dubrovskij" by Aleksandr Sergeevich Pushkin is an unfinished novel written in 1832. When a wealthy aristocrat seizes his father's land, young Vladimir Dubrovsky takes justice into his own hands. He forms a band of serfs and becomes a noble outlaw, robbing the rich to help the poor. But when he falls in love with his enemy's daughter, his vendetta takes an unexpected and tragic turn. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
